states.name: Stella
states.title: Herald of the Holy Tomorrow
states.description: Stella sees a possible future when she sleeps. During the day, she travels, teaching of this glorious time to come. She knows certain things must come to pass for it to happen, and tries to warn the world. Stella teaches of the Holy Tomorrow, and has amassed a small cult.

states.name: Stella
states.title: Herald of the Holy Tomorrow
states.description: While she cannot understand and manufacture the complex technologies of the Holy Tomorrow, she adorns herself with gadgets that mimic that tomorrowland. When she now dreams of the future, she can grab objects from the Holy Tomorrow and bring them to the present. She's made her vestment of gears and objects appropriated from her mechanical utopia.
